name: Xbox 360 Controller (Wired, FFB experiment)
notes: EXPERIMENTAL variant of xbox-360-wired with a second TLC (Usage Page PID, Usage Set Effect Report) containing a Report ID 0x0F 7-byte output. Tests whether WGI's hidforcefeedback.cpp path dispatches vibration to an explicit HID PID output collection even on a 045E VID that xinputhid doesn't bind to. Consumers may see this as two separate gamepad entities — mitigate by checking browser + joy.cpl view. If input parsing breaks, revert to xbox-360-wired.
